narrative:
St. Marys City has 5,334 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
